summary: Iteration 4 smoke-test PASSED across backend & frontend. All 5 critical backend endpoints work; all 6 frontend flows visually verified (Styles banner+datalist with 11 sections, Costing image banner, Production split-by-color with 4 cards, Components tracker).
passed: GET /api/pos/{id}/invoice.pdf -> 200, %PDF, 8205 bytes, invoice_no SSK26-27-001 persisted & idempotent on re-fetch
PATCH /api/production/jobs/{id}/components -> 200, components persisted, history entry event='component_update' written
POST /api/invoices/job -> 200, %PDF, 5403 bytes (single-PO partial invoice w/ 2 job_ids)
POST /api/styles with bom.section='Custom Section X' (free string) -> 200, saved with custom section
Frontend Styles list: image banner area renders (h-44 detected, 2 image banners visible for 2 styles)

Frontend Styles edit modal: BOM section input uses datalist 'bom-sections-list' with all 11 predefined sections (Upper Top, Mid Layer / Reinforcement, Lining, Bottom Layer, Insole Board + Cushion, Insole Cover (PU/Leather), Sole, Accessory, Consumable, Packing, Other)
Frontend Costing: after selecting style with image_url, h-56 image banner renders with style code + name caption
Frontend Production Kanban: ZFLWWFLT07275 split into 2 cards (CREAM 720 pairs + WINE 720 pairs); ZFLWWFLT07274 also 2 cards (CREAM+TAUPE); Procurement column header shows '4 · 2880'

Frontend Production card Components section visible with 3 boxes: UPPER (Upper Top/Mid Layer/Lining), BOTTOM/INSOLE (Bottom Layer/Insole Board+Cushion/Insole Cover (PU/Leather)), SOLE — each has a checkbox
action_items: Optional follow-up (not blocking): the 'No Image' placeholder graphic could not be visually validated because both seeded styles already have image_url. Code path appears present (h-44 banner div renders for all cards). Consider creating a style without image to visually confirm placeholder.

Dispatched-stage Invoice button + Merge checkbox UX was not exercised in UI because no jobs are currently in 'dispatched' stage; underlying POST /api/invoices/job and /api/invoices/merged endpoints both verified working at API layer.
